steps.title: Spot what both trails have in common
steps.content: The notes label both the Columbia Trail and the Flint Hills Trail as rail trails — the shared trait to be emphasized.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly states “Both the Columbia Trail and the Flint Hills Trail are rail trails,” emphasizing their similarity. The other choices either contrast locations, describe one trail only, or mention a trait without connecting both. That matches choice C — C is correct.
